assessments.rationale: Keybar cross-section is a constant 2D profile — exactly the geometry class cold-drawing is designed for. Well within ZOLLERN's draw bench capacity and maximum cross-section area (7,650 mm2).
42CrMo4 and C60 are standard ZOLLERN production grades. Fatigue limit ~480 MPa at 10^7 cycles for tempered 42CrMo4.
Keybar cross-sections for turbo-generators and hydro-generators are well below the 2,500 mm2 cold-draw limit.
Cold-drawn inherent Ra 0.4-3.2 um meets the lamination contact quality requirement without additional finishing.
ZOLLERN provides EN 10204 3.1 as standard per delivery lot with heat-to-bar traceability.
